Defines memory configuration constants for heap size and alignment in JerryScript.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines memory configuration parameters for a software system. It includes a preprocessor directive to prevent multiple inclusions and imports another configuration file, `config.h`. The file defines two constants: `JMEM_HEAP_SIZE`, which specifies the size of the heap memory area using a value from `CONFIG_MEM_HEAP_AREA_SIZE`, and `JMEM_ALIGNMENT_LOG`, which sets the logarithm of the required alignment for memory allocation units or blocks. These definitions are used to configure memory management settings in the system.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `config.h`
